FULLxD-CONF.action: present wall-day fraction to the user; only he relaxes the <=1-day bar

FULLxD-BELOW.action: present priced residual (2nd GPU / cloud burst / priced waiver); never relax silently

PARTxD-CONF.action: present wall-day fraction to the user; only he relaxes the <=1-day bar

PARTxD-BELOW.action: present priced residual (2nd GPU / cloud burst / priced waiver); never relax silently

FAILxD-CONF.action: present wall-day fraction to the user; only he relaxes the <=1-day bar

FAILxD-BELOW.action: present priced residual (2nd GPU / cloud burst / priced waiver); never relax silently

corner_finding: PASS at L10-FULL-low (25.6k tok/s) requires budget<=2.2B; at 2.5B it is 1.13d = MARGINAL — decision table v1.1 records this
